name: Maxim Bortnikov
bio: Self-proclaimed embedded systems engineer, aspiring web developer, and self-taught cryptographer dedicated to securing digital communications.
project-1-description: An experimental file sharing app built using Next.js and Perplexity.
project-2-description: A cloud storage service with client-side file encryption built using Next.js.
project-3-description: A hardware data vault equipped with advanced cryptographic features.
project-4-description: An ESP32 CYD version of Midbar that stores encrypted data in Firebase.
project-5-description: A simple web app that allows users to encrypt files in the browser.
project-6-description: An addressable RGB LED strip controller that utilizes Espressif MCUs.
project-7-description: Just a project I made for my internship entry assignment.
project-8-description: A project I created using templates I discovered on CodePen.
playground-text: You can keep pressing that button until you get bored!
link-text: Click "Learn More ➔" on the container to explore more of my works.
